title: —consider creating a BBT Group?
content:
—consider creating a BBT Group?
—AIB doesn’t have a social media presence


—add automated responses to FB messenger
  • Greeting
  • Instant reply
  • Saved replies
  • Away message —-do we want the fb feed on BBT website?

What are the demographics of BBT’s audience? Break up demo into different ads

—AIB needs a social presence because the numbers show the website visits are much smaller than IG and FB interactions
—Constant Contact FB Button
—Mailing List Button on all social media
—finish FB blueprint
—make all sites ADA compliant
